examples.title: Servlet Lifecycle Pseudocode
examples.code:
BEGIN
 init()
 WHILE true
 service()
 END WHILE
 destroy()
END
examples.explanation: The servlet lifecycle consists of three main methods: init(), service(), and destroy().

examples.title: Basic Servlet Example
examples.description: A simple servlet that handles GET requests
examples.explanation: This servlet extends HttpServlet and overrides the doGet() method to handle GET requests.

examples.title: Servlet Session Tracking Example
examples.explanation: This servlet uses HttpSession to store and retrieve session attributes.
